name: Cashlink Technologies
oneliner: BaFin-licensed crypto securities registrar and qualified custodian for Germany's eWpG regime — the issuer-side layer of the EU tokenisation stack. Series A, €7M.
finserv: BaFin crypto securities registrar and qualified custodian under eWpG; tight partnership with 21X for the trading venue. Backed by Helaba, Block.one, BMH, TechQuartier, Futury Capital.
team: Operator team with regulated-securities DNA. Strategic investors are exactly the mix that matters for German institutional distribution (Helaba = public-sector bank, Block.one = capital).
thesis: Cashlink sits at exactly the infrastructure chokepoint BG cares about: every eWpG-issued tokenised bond or fund needs a regulated registrar, and Cashlink has first-mover BaFin clearance. Pair it with 21X as the venue and Tangany as the custodian and you have Europe's first end-to-end tokenised-securities rail.
